mapper.select:
SELECT
DATE(create_time) AS date
DATE_FORMAT(create_time, '%Y-W%u') AS date
DATE_FORMAT(create_time, '%Y-%m') AS date
DATE(create_time) AS date
, COUNT(*) AS orderCount, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'COMPLETED' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS completedCount FROM t_order WHERE deleted = 0
AND create_time >= #{startDate}
AND create_time <= #{endDate}
GROUP BY DATE(create_time) DATE_FORMAT(create_time, '%Y-W%u') DATE_FORMAT(create_time, '%Y-%m') DATE(create_time)
ORDER BY date

SELECT COALESCE(SUM(estimated_price), 0) AS totalAmount, COALESCE(SUM(subsidy_amount), 0) AS totalSubsidyAmount, COALESCE(SUM(self_pay_amount), 0) AS totalSelfPayAmount FROM t_order WHERE deleted = 0
AND provider_id = #{providerId}
